title: Barbfly
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Barbflies''' were flying, nest-making insects from the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy]], that accompanied the warring species into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They were used to create traps and snares for swoops.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

{{Interlang
|de=Stachelfliege#legends
}}
